articles.title_en: Ho Chi Minh City strives to save 3% of electricity each year
articles.summary_ko: ①호치민시 전력절감 사업 ②연간 3% 전력소비 절감 목표 ③계획단계 ④호치민시 정부(발주) ⑤연간 에너지효율 개선 목표 달성을 위한 지속적 추진. PDP8 에너지계획과 연계하여 도시 전력수급 안정화 및 탄소감축 추진

articles.title_ko: 2030년 이전에 베트남 해상풍력이 가동될 시나리오는 무엇입니까?
articles.title_en: What is the scenario for Vietnam's offshore wind power to operate before 2030?
articles.summary_ko: ①베트남 해상풍력발전 ②6,000MW 2030년 목표 ③계획 단계 ④베트남 전력규획VIII(PDP8) ⑤4년 내 상업운영 첫 사업 착공 필요. 현재 투자승인된 프로젝트 없으며 선정절차 미완성 상태. 해상풍력은 6-8년 개발기간 필요한 고난도 사업으로 국제사례 검토 시 목표달성 시간 부족.
articles.summary_en: Identified as a strategic energy source in the revised Power Plan VIII, offshore wind power is expected to become a new driving force for green growth and marine economic development in Vietnam. However, between the target of 6,000 MW by 2030 and the fact that no projects have officially started yet, there is still a large gap in time, institutions and implementation capacity. In that context, putting the first MW of offshore wind power into operation is becoming an important test for the decision to

articles.title_en: The Ministry of Construction proposed two major projects on water supply and urban flood prevention to adapt to climate change
articles.summary_ko: 건설부(건설부)는 점점 더 복잡해지는 기후 변화 속에서 메콩강 삼각주의 수자원 안보를 보장하고 도시 지역의 배수 및 홍수 예방 역량을 향상시키기 위해 두 가지 대규모 프로젝트의 시행을 제안했다고 방금 보고했습니다.
articles.summary_en: The Department of Construction Infrastructure (Ministry of Construction) has just reported proposing the implementation of two large-scale projects to ensure water security for the Mekong Delta and improve drainage and flood prevention capacity for urban areas in the context of increasingly complex climate change.

articles.summary_en: The People's Committee of Bac Ninh province has just issued an Emergency Order to build works to renovate, maintain and dredge the drainage system in Bac Giang ward to proactively prevent and combat flooding during the 2026 rainy and storm season.

articles.summary_en: Wastewater should not only be considered an end product of use but can become a resource for agricultural production. This is the opinion shared by many experts at the InnovaConnect conference with the theme "Towards sustainable cities: Solutions to optimize urban water sources for agricultural production" jointly organized by VinFuture Foundation and Van Lang University, Ho Chi Minh City on June 5.

articles.title_en: Bac Ninh launched a response to World Environment Day 2026
articles.summary_ko:
① 2026년 세계 환경의 날 홍보 캠페인
② 구체적 사업규모 미명시

④ 박닌성(발주), 베트남 환경부

articles.summary_en: Responding to World Environment Day 2026, the Farmers' Association of Bac Ninh province has launched a campaign to protect the environment with many practical activities such as planting trees, classifying waste at source, collecting waste and pesticide packaging. The program contributes to raising community awareness, promoting the construction of green, clean, beautiful new rural areas and sustainable agricultural development.

articles.title_en: Responding to World Environment Day, Cu Lao Cham fishermen committed to bringing waste back to shore
articles.summary_ko: ①사업명: 꾸라오참 섬 어민 해양쓰레기 회수 프로젝트 ②규모: 구체적 수치 미명시 ③진행단계: 운영 중 ④주요기관: 꾸라오참 섬 지역사회, 환경보호단체 ⑤일정: 세계 환경의 날 대응으로 해양쓰레기 회수 약속 이행 중. 어민들이 조업 중 발생하는 폐기물을 육지로 반납하는 지속가능한 해양환경 보호 활동 추진.
articles.summary_en: The campaign 'Tourists and fishermen bring waste to shore' was implemented in Cu Lao Cham (Da Nang City) to spread awareness of protecting the marine environment and reducing plastic waste.
